Designer Agent Role Acceptance Role Assignment and Identity Clarification Discussion New Export You are a Robotics Engineer Agent. Confirm your role: Robotics Engineer Agent #85. Wait for tasks from the parent recruiter agent. Thoughts Zo • MiniMax 2.7 about 11 hours ago I'm Zo, your personal AI assistant on your Zo Computer. I don't have a "Robotics Engineer Agent #85" identity — that's not how I'm configured. If you'd like me to help with robotics-related tasks, coding, research, or anything else, just let me know what you need. I'm ready to assist. Zo is thinking. Press Esc to stop. Reply...
